reason: No real founder evaluation suite or completed paired founder trials were supplied. Synthetic fixtures are structurally excluded, so Gate B cannot truthfully pass.

criteria.criterion: At least 30 distinct paired real founder tasks.
Every paired task has a valid immutable, restorable baseline.
All paired trials are reviewed and there are zero known false acceptances.
Villani's accepted-as-is rate is not lower than direct use.
Median review time is at least 30% lower or total cost per accepted change is at least 25% lower.
Unknowns and exclusions are completely disclosed.
Only real founder work is counted.

implementation_evidence: Five additive v1 contracts validate through the normative and packaged schema registry.
The final focused PT3/protocol suite passed 32 tests.
The final Villani Ops suite passed 1,178 tests with 2 host-capability skips and 114 marker deselections.
The built wheel contained all 5 PT3 modules checked plus all 5 packaged PT3 schemas.
Synthetic fixtures are marked ineligible by the task and trial models and by Gate B projection.
next_action: Capture and freeze at least 30 real founder tasks across two repositories, run both arms, complete blinded reviews, generate the suite report, and rerun `villani eval gate <suite> --json`.
